name: claude-hooks-live-server-runs-from-test-worktree
tags: live server, launchd, worktree, deploy, main branch, dev branch, claude-hooks-test, claude-hooks-dev, task:aacf3ef3
body:
The production claude-hooks hook server (launchd job com.debaditya.claude-hooks-pipeline, uvicorn on :8766) runs from ~/workspace/claude-hooks-test's checkout, not ~/workspace/claude-hooks (main) or claude-hooks-dev.

Why: the repo uses a dev->test->main promotion flow (see /deploy skill) where test is the worktree the live daemon actually serves from — main is just the shipped/tagged endpoint of the pipeline, dev is where feature work happens.

How to apply: new feature work must start in ~/workspace/claude-hooks-dev (branch dev), never edited directly on ~/workspace/claude-hooks (main) — main edits have zero runtime effect and bypass the unit-gate/full-suite checks. Always land features via /deploy dev->test->main to reach the live server.
